sections.title: Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary is an essential building block of English. Formula: Noun + be-verb + colour (+ symbolism) | Court/legal noun + verb (+ legal action). Rules: Colour adjectives come before nouns (a red flower) or after be-verb (the flower is red) | 'symbol of' + noun expresses what a colour represents | Judiciary verbs: a judge 'announces a verdict', a lawyer 'argues a case', a witness 'testifies' | 'found guilty/not guilty' is the fixed court verdict phrase
sections.formula: Noun + be-verb + colour (+ symbolism) | Court/legal noun + verb (+ legal action)

examples.hindi: लाल रंग खतरे का प्रतीक है।
examples.english: Red colour is a symbol of danger.

examples.hindi: आसमान नीला दिखता है।
examples.english: The sky looks blue.

examples.hindi: हरा रंग शांति का प्रतीक है।
examples.english: Green colour is a symbol of peace.

examples.hindi: उसने पीली शर्ट पहनी है।
examples.english: He is wearing a yellow shirt.

examples.hindi: काला रंग सबको पसंद है।
examples.english: Everyone likes black colour.

examples.hindi: सफेद रंग शुद्धता दर्शाता है।
examples.english: White colour represents purity.

sections.title: Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Noun + be-verb + colour (+ symbolism) | Court/legal noun + verb (+ legal action)

examples.hindi: यह फूल नारंगी रंग का है।
examples.english: This flower is orange in colour.

examples.hindi: बैंगनी रंग शाही माना जाता है।
examples.english: Purple colour is considered royal.

examples.hindi: उसे गुलाबी रंग बहुत पसंद है।
examples.english: She likes pink colour a lot.

examples.hindi: भूरे रंग की मिट्टी उपजाऊ होती है।
examples.english: Brown coloured soil is fertile.

examples.hindi: अदालत में सुनवाई चल रही है।
examples.english: The hearing is going on in the court.

examples.hindi: जज ने फैसला सुनाया।
examples.english: The judge announced the verdict.

sections.title: Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Noun + be-verb + colour (+ symbolism) | Court/legal noun + verb (+ legal action)

examples.hindi: वकील ने बहस की।
examples.english: The lawyer argued the case.

examples.hindi: कानून सबके लिए समान है।
examples.english: The law is equal for everyone.

examples.hindi: न्याय में देरी नहीं होनी चाहिए।
examples.english: There should be no delay in justice.

examples.hindi: गवाह ने सच बताया।
examples.english: The witness told the truth.

sections.title: Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Colours & Judiciary Vocabulary. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Noun + be-verb + colour (+ symbolism) | Court/legal noun + verb (+ legal action)

examples.hindi: सबूत अदालत में पेश किए गए।
examples.english: Evidence was presented in the court.

examples.hindi: मुकदमा तीन साल चला।
examples.english: The trial went on for three years.

examples.hindi: जूरी ने फैसला किया।
examples.english: The jury made the decision.

examples.hindi: अदालत ने आरोपी को दोषी पाया।
examples.english: The court found the accused guilty.
